notes: v0.16.65 — VINYL ROULETTE pre-match carousel + Silver Rain Glitch track pack (+10 tracks) + duration-based BOSS pool. (1) Pre-match carousel replaced with a vinyl record that spins fast, decelerates with a (1-p²) curve, and lands with the picked track's notch under a fixed gold needle. Real cover art flips onto the centre label when locked, info panel reveals title + BPM + duration + BPM-synced EQ. (2) 10 new tracks scanned & analysed: Copper Gears Steam, Eighty-Eight Keys, Neon Blade, Neon Dustwire, Neon Golden Gate, Signal in the Dark, Silent Blade, Silver Rain Glitch, Silver Rain Vein, Silverspeed Violins. (3) Track pool reorg: BOSS pool = every track ≥ 180s (13 tracks). ARENA/CAPTURE/PAINT all share one general pool of every track in the library (33 tracks). HUB stays the ambient menu music only. (4) All 34 tracks now have cover art (4 older covers were missing, got procedurally generated). Windows only.
